settings.headline:
We built this
because the industry
let us down.
settings.subline: KULTIV began as a research project, not a product brief. Two years of validating the inflammaging and microbiome science before a single gram was formulated.

settings.ticker_items: Inflammaging Research|Microbiome Science|FSA Complete Food Classification|BRC Grade A Manufacturing|Full Ingredient Transparency|UK Registered 2025

settings.headline: Months of science validation before product development.
settings.body_1: Most nutrition brands start with a market gap and build backwards to a formula. We started with the research — specifically the inflammaging literature and the growing evidence base around Akkermansia muciniphila and gut microbiome diversity as drivers of biological ageing.
settings.body_2: The product came second. Hire #1 was a food scientist with a functional nutrition background, not a marketer. The formulation stack was reviewed against the primary research, not category benchmarks.

settings.title: Full Transparency
settings.description: Every ingredient listed. Every dose published. No proprietary blends that hide what's actually in the formula.

settings.title: Complete Food, Not Supplement
settings.description: FSA-classified as a complete food. Stricter manufacturing standards. Tighter label regulations. We chose the harder path.

settings.title: Science-First Formulation
settings.description: Every ingredient inclusion is tied to the peer-reviewed literature. When the science changes, our formula evolves.
